quality.rationale: 从局部惯性系零力矩条件出发结合正交性推导FW方程，逻辑严密且直接对应卫星重力探测与自旋进动实验背景

origin.question: Problem 11.4. Show that a gyroscope with no applied torques Fermi-Walker transports its spin vector.
origin.answer: $\nabla_{\mathbf{u}} \mathbf{S} = (\mathbf{S} \cdot \mathbf{a}) \mathbf{u}$ (满足费米-沃克输运方程 $\nabla_{\mathbf{u}} \mathbf{S} = (\mathbf{S} \cdot \mathbf{a}) \mathbf{u} - (\mathbf{S} \cdot \mathbf{u}) \mathbf{a}$，其中 $\mathbf{S} \cdot \mathbf{u} = 0$)
origin.solution:
Consider an observer in the local inertial frame comoving with the center of mass of the gyroscope. Because there are no torques,he sees no precession of the spin axis, so $\underline{\mathrm{dS}}/\mathrm{dt} = 0$ . But in this frame the 4-velocity of the gyroscope is $\mathbf{u} = (1,0)$ , so we can write the condition of zero torque as$$
abla_{\mathbf {u}} \mathbf {S} = \mathbf{g} \mathbf{u}$$where $\mathbf{g}$ is some constant of proportionality. We find $\mathbf{g}$ from the fact that $\mathbf{S} \cdot \mathbf{u} = 0$ :$$ egin{array}{l} 0 = 
abla_{\mathbf {u}} (\mathbf {S} \cdot \mathbf {u}) = (
abla_{\mathbf {u}} \mathbf {S}) \cdot \mathbf{u} + \mathbf{S} \cdot (
abla_{\mathbf {u}} \mathbf {u}) \= \mathbf {g} \mathbf{u} \cdot \mathbf{u} + \mathbf{S} \cdot \mathbf{a} \= - \mathbf {g} + \mathbf{S} \cdot \mathbf{a}. \\end{array}$$Thus$$
abla_{\mathbf {u}} \mathbf {S} = (\mathbf{S} \cdot \mathbf{a}) \mathbf{u}$$which is the equation for Fermi-Walker transport$$
abla_{\mathbf {u}} \mathbf {S} = (\mathbf{S} \cdot \mathbf{a}) \mathbf{u} - (\mathbf{S} \cdot \mathbf{u}) \mathbf{a}$$with $\mathbf{S} \cdot \mathbf{u} = 0$ .
